name: Option Decision Gate
description: Phase 175 — run BEFORE accepting a primary option (Manage → Design Options → Make Primary → Accept Primary). Validates the destruction blast radius and emits an audit so the team can recover state if the merge breaks downstream sheets/schedules.

steps.label: Find schedules/ghost tags/sheets that depend on options
Mint isolation views per option (last chance to capture losing alternatives)
Bundle a backup briefcase before destructive merge
